channel.title: GitHub Rust Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Rust in GitHub

item.title: rust-analyzer/rust-analyzer
item.description: A Rust compiler front-end for IDEs

item.title: rust-lang/rust
item.description: Empowering everyone to build reliable and efficient software.

item.title: dani-garcia/vaultwarden
item.description: Unofficial Bitwarden compatible server written in Rust, formerly known as bitwarden_rs

item.title: meilisearch/MeiliSearch
item.description: Powerful, fast, and an easy to use search engine

item.title: tikv/tikv
item.description: Distributed transactional key-value database, originally created to complement TiDB

item.title: Sh1Yo/x8
item.description: Hidden parameters discovery suite

item.title: datafuselabs/datafuse
item.description: A Modern Real-Time Data Processing & Analytics DBMS with Cloud-Native Architecture, written in Rust

item.title: hyperium/tonic
item.description: A native gRPC client & server implementation with async/await support.

item.title: bevyengine/bevy
item.description: A refreshingly simple data-driven game engine built in Rust

item.title: Kethku/neovide
item.description: No Nonsense Neovim Client in Rust

item.title: clap-rs/clap
item.description: A full featured, fast Command Line Argument Parser for Rust

item.title: rust-lang/cargo
item.description: The Rust package manager

item.title: rust-lang/rustlings
item.description: 🦀 Small exercises to get you used to reading and writing Rust code!

item.title: tauri-apps/tauri
item.description: Build smaller, faster, and more secure desktop applications with a web frontend.

item.title: PyO3/pyo3
item.description: Rust bindings for the Python interpreter

item.title: shadowsocks/shadowsocks-rust
item.description: A Rust port of shadowsocks

item.title: rust-unofficial/awesome-rust
item.description: A curated list of Rust code and resources.

item.title: firecracker-microvm/firecracker
item.description: Secure and fast microVMs for serverless computing.

item.title: starship/starship
item.description: ☄🌌️ The minimal, blazing-fast, and infinitely customizable prompt for any shell!

item.title: pingcap/talent-plan
item.description: open source training courses about distributed database and distributed systemes

item.title: hecrj/iced
item.description: A cross-platform GUI library for Rust, inspired by Elm

item.title: denoland/deno
item.description: A secure JavaScript and TypeScript runtime

item.title: tokio-rs/tokio
item.description: A runtime for writing reliable asynchronous applications with Rust. Provides I/O, networking, scheduling, timers, ...

item.title: XAMPPRocky/tokei
item.description: Count your code, quickly.

item.title: mullvad/mullvadvpn-app
item.description: The Mullvad VPN client app for desktop and mobile
